# ImagenCoach Rebuild

Repository: TeamStationAIAxiomVertex/imagen-coach
Primary domain: https://imagencoach.com
Purpose: Rebuild Sonia McRorey's larger/general ImagenCoach site from Weblium into a GitHub and Cloudflare-managed static site.

## Important Context

- This repo is not the Guadalajara-specific site.
- `TeamStationAIAxiomVertex/guadalajara` / `imagengdl.com` is the UX/UI reference.
- The content source of truth is the archived `imagencoach.com` crawl in this repo.
- All 35 canonical URLs from the current sitemap must be preserved.

## Key Files

- `AGENTS.md`: agent instructions.
- `docs/source-url-inventory.md`: canonical URL contract.
- `docs/SDD.md`: software design document.
- `docs/DDD.md`: domain-driven design document.
- `docs/TDD.md`: test and QA strategy.
- `docs/LLM_CONTEXT.md`: compact future-agent context.
- `content/clean/manifest.json`: cleaned content manifest.
- `archive/imagencoach/manifest.json`: raw crawl manifest.

## Voice

Sonia's voice is calm, intelligent, executive, reflective, and grounded. SEO must support her voice, not replace it.
